disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid onset over a few hours of severe swelling and pain in a single region — the top of the left foot and ankle
trigger_question_examples: What happened and when did it start?
Which joint or part of the foot is affected?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The top of my left foot and my ankle blew up over just a few hours this evening and it's really painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to bear weight on the affected leg
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or walk on it?
How is it affecting your movement?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can't put any weight on it — I've been hopping around.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or rigors reported (temperature not actually measured)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or shaking chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't feel feverish and I haven't had the shakes, but I haven't actually measured my temperature.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No preceding trauma or injury to the foot
trigger_question_examples: Did you hurt, twist or knock it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I didn't do anything to it — it just came on by itself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Background of intermittent, self-resolving swelling of small joints of the hands and feet
trigger_question_examples: Have your joints ever swelled up like this before?
Any history of arthritis or joint problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had short episodes of joints puffing up in my hands and feet before, but they always settled on their own and were never this severe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The big-toe joint is not involved — the pain and swelling are in the midfoot and ankle
trigger_question_examples: Is your big toe affected at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my big toe is fine — it's the top of my foot and my ankle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild redness and warmth over the affected joint as the patient perceives it
trigger_question_examples: Does it look red or feel warm?
What does the skin over it look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a bit red and feels warm, but not bright shiny red.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The swelling is confined to the joint region; the calf is not swollen and is not tender
trigger_question_examples: Is your calf swollen or sore?
Does the swelling go up your leg?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my calf is fine — it's just the foot and ankle that are swollen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Worried it could be a bone infection or a blood clot
trigger_question_examples: What are you most worried about?
Is there something specific you're afraid this might be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm scared it's a serious infection in the bone or a clot in my leg.
